    190.Minthara: The darkness here reminds me of home - so does the danger. Be on your guard.TG_SCL_EnteredShadowLands!TG_SCL_EnteredShadowLandsGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

        357.Minthara: Z'rell said we should begin our search at the Thorm Mausoleum. It is north of the House of Healing, deep in the shadows.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e12a005c-583e-5f7d-488d-c0a9689b383eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h564471eag818cg45d4g845dg47ab9286e33bText UUID: 59e0738b-ac8a-401a-bd11-ba33fd90ddc9Timeline Phase Index: 136Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e12a005c-583e-5f7d-488d-c0a9689b383eTimeline Phase Duration: 9.52sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1372.55s-1382.07s] | @ 1372.55s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1372.55s-1382.07s] | @ 1375.02s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1372.55s-1382.07s] | @ 1376.01s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1372.55s-1382.07s] | @ 1379.97s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1372.55s-1382.07s] | @ 1381.27s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • +
          39.Minthara: I would advise a thorough search of Balthazar's chambers at the tower before delving into the mausoleum. Any knowledge we can find may arm us for what is to come.!MOO_BalthazarsSecrets_Knows_NightsongSecret

          Flags and Tags

            290.Player: The House of Healing might be a good place to scavenge medical supplies.!Minthara_InParty_Nested_TopicalGreetings_AskedAboutHouseOfHealingMinthara_InParty_Nested_TopicalGreetings_AskedAboutHouseOfHealing

              192.Minthara: Doubtful. Like everything else in these lands, its original purpose has been corrupted by the shadows.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7abdaecc-8be5-4716-7a86-8883632ea45cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h30d9c1edgd37fg4cb5gb9a1gc88764b78ff9Text UUID: 9d6ff9ba-65bd-4b45-9813-721296f893deTimeline Phase Index: 180Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7abdaecc-8be5-4716-7a86-8883632ea45cTimeline Phase Duration: 8.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1819.65s-1828.05s] | @ 1819.65s | speaker 0 | Sleeping (256)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1819.65s-1828.05s] | @ 1820.25s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1819.65s-1828.05s] | @ 1821.8s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1819.65s-1828.05s] | @ 1825.58s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1819.65s-1828.05s] | @ 1826.79s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1

                59.Minthara: Something lingers there. Something that inspires terror among those cultists unfortunate enough to have glimpsed it while patrolling the area.

                Metadata

                  31.Minthara: They dare not enter. Naturally, anything that frightens them intrigues me. We should investigate.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 130ce804-96bd-d7ce-500d-fff48e7f0091Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h63a694cfg7f86g4532g9a44g9a5a7a2bd1d7Text UUID: 3d4ed205-72f7-4409-b44c-4f20adb07cccGroup ID: 27cb7cc4-a098-6ebf-7046-87c315a592e4Group Index: 1

            169.Player: Any idea what we should expect to find at the Mausoleum?

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6f576edb-0e5e-e76e-3978-8bfce851a738Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8ff58ca7g74f2g4545g829agfd57d066d3d0Text UUID: 2522435c-98d0-49fd-bfcd-185868892d85Show Once: True
            • +
              252.Minthara: Ketheric himself was entombed there for decades. An undying man, sealed in darkness with the bones of his ancestors.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9cda32fc-a4fe-393d-b00b-02af4d955909Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8cb3833dgcb07g48d8g90a7g58a04d76b8acText UUID:                 336.Minthara: I would have thought he'd seen enough of the place for several lifetimes, but he still visits on occasion.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d32d6b7f-e3be-126f-a6f3-a7e894ee3119Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hdf46c914g2069g47fagb1d2g49a9609f766eText UUID: eda3847a-311a-4600-97b5-a501edb23839Group ID: 9cda32fc-a4fe-393d-b00b-02af4d955909Group Index: 1
                • +
                  365.Minthara: Perhaps a particle of sentimentality remains in Ketheric, and he mourns for his family. I do not know.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e644ed66-dd02-e89e-df6a-eec25cb47d76Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4753c139gb408g4337g9c91g01deac8ee053Text UUID: 7e7beade-4537-48bb-afd9-db0af949335fGroup ID: 9cda32fc-a4fe-393d-b00b-02af4d955909Group Index: 2
                  • +
                    176.Minthara: But if Balthazar's mission has taken him to the Mausoleum, we will find more there than bones and memories.

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 722b7fcc-4716-3318-d093-e9eec8ced6efSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hcffa5bb7g8509g4b74g93c6g40ed53deb985Text UUID: f77d68fb-4d3e-4598-86d7-3a9b31c22886Group ID: 9cda32fc-a4fe-393d-b00b-02af4d955909Group Index: 3
                    • See Node 79 (Minthara) (no line text)
    • +
      107.Player: Did you spend much time in these lands when you served the Absolute?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 41db1cc7-ceb4-0523-97e5-740b6a89d626Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hb0749e20g4e59g4f19gb3abga28f419aa46dText UUID: e4f17656-12fd-4663-9723-73adf575146eShow Once: True
      • +
        373.Minthara: No. My indoctrination - my infection - took place at Moonrise, but I did not stay here for long.

        Metadata

          300.Minthara: Some True Souls are not fit to go to war. They act as guards in these lands, or spread the cult's influence through more insidious means than conquest.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: bdec8f63-9d38-a7cc-18b3-6d6fdb0a4ca7Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7e10c54eg6913g4b49g829dgf2e37393055cText UUID: b26e4fb8-54ab-4c15-afb2-854d7b90294fGroup ID: ec452db7-e18a-f4df-7854-9d485315afc5Group Index: 1
          • +
            254.Minthara: Ketheric recognised me as a soldier, and took me into his army immediately.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9d45714f-0ac6-9e52-069d-4fd8e2cc7a87Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd30b7435g3fc5g4e0ag9f5dg9ae3925fb3faText UUID: a6c5e1a8-3f98-44ee-b9ca-fabf0e89e47cGroup ID: ec452db7-e18a-f4df-7854-9d485315afc5Group Index: 2
            • +
              326.Minthara: First, I fought alongside him, and then I was given a command of my own. That is where we first met.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ce443f49-0e49-ec06-ee53-b780c3262cfaSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3526f0f8gd5c9g459egb883g10da1e5e5e27Text UUID: cd0330a0-468f-42f8-852a-efc0ad8bc708Group ID: ec452db7-e18a-f4df-7854-9d485315afc5Group Index: 3
              • +
                380.Minthara: That I was willing - honoured even - to lead a pack of goblins in the Absolute's name is proof enough that I did not know my own mind.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f3cb8095-9f95-d4b1-b51c-966c1604fa24Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h3849b5ccga450g4c95g99ceg5a364ed8edcbText UUID: 916e954c-0f16-4ca4-9e3e-7b240d936c61Group ID: ec452db7-e18a-f4df-7854-9d485315afc5Group Index: 4
                • •

      381.Player: Strange that the cult gathers its forces in such a hostile place.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f447d8a3-adc0-962f-71ae-e8c20b28ce36Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8ef9552egae49g4194g849fg5122286f4e38Text UUID: 44b10f1e-2f43-4882-a9b5-8df486485361Show Once: True
      • +
        35.Minthara: It is not only a hostile place, it is a hidden place. My family have a saying: Let the first blood you draw be your enemy's end.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 14f3db3f-e822-089d-ac29-3fb819bc6a06Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb937e43fgdcafg46b2g82f8g81cabe0b4ec1Text UUID: dec3ed31-acb6-423e-b11b-08e55bb2cbf8Timeline Phase Index: 114Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 14f3db3f-e822-089d-ac29-3fb819bc6a06Timeline Phase Duration: 22.22sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1161.85s-1172.92s] | @ 1161.85s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1161.85s-1172.92s] | @ 1164.92s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1161.85s-1172.92s] | @ 1169.75s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1161.85s-1172.92s] | @ 1171.47s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1172.92s-1184.07s] | @ 1172.92s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1172.92s-1184.07s] | @ 1176.51s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1172.92s-1184.07s] | @ 1178.82s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1172.92s-1184.07s] | @ 1181.77s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1172.92s-1184.07s] | @ 1182.82s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 14f3db3f-e822-089d-ac29-3fb819bc6a06Group Index: 0
        • +
          194.Minthara: Ketheric is working from the same principle. He raises his army in shadow so none may know the extent of his power until it is too late to resist.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7b856574-f79a-f477-c411-6b7c65e1e8a9Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h19460004gd04dg4781g8513g3eb1bcf65bccText UUID: fb6f222e-2928-4c21-a915-6b167890fc0cGroup ID: 14f3db3f-e822-089d-ac29-3fb819bc6a06Group Index: 1
          • See Node 356 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      44.Player: Where should we go next?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1f2e37e7-7d14-fe6f-e8c8-ba63fce24c37Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc09aabb2g71a4g4413ga4e5ge7cfc6599966Text UUID: 9c18d491-787b-4106-bc97-9a840af8cc63Show Once: True
      • +
        250.Minthara: To kill Ketheric, we must strip him of the power that keeps death from claiming him.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9afe72a8-f3b9-0940-0cb4-d984a922e50cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf80b2795g7904g435dg9295gcb355cbd3da1Text UUID: 9887ca5f-7f87-4bc5-995a-c8a627a2842cTimeline Phase Index: 208Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 9afe72a8-f3b9-0940-0cb4-d984a922e50cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2112.01s-2118.31s] | @ 2112.01s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2112.01s-2118.31s] | @ 2114.4s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2112.01s-2118.31s] | @ 2117.02s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • +
          123.Minthara: We know that power has its source in a relic - the Nightsong - and we know that Balthazar was responsible for its creation.MOO_BalthazarsSecrets_Knows_NightsongSecret

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Global
          • MOO_BalthazarsSecrets_Knows_NightsongSecret {3599ecf9-382d-46b7-8c72-c7d99303d7c4} = True

            Flags and Tags

            • SHA_Necromancer_State_Dead {f83edb0d-f11f-4a3e-a866-58af8fc6c96d} = True

            91.Minthara: Allying with that maggot-infested wretch makes my skin crawl, but if he can help us to secure the relic, so be it.SHA_Necromancer_Event_AgreedToHelp

            Metadata

      202.Player: Were you indoctrinated in the tower when you first came to the cult?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7ed13a1d-1f37-ad8c-03b7-4bbbaea5641bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hcf28901fgc653g4d04gbd21ga26e3b6249dcText UUID: daa9ae5d-5798-4762-b45e-6e40aed97419Show Once: True
      • +
        267.Minthara: Not in the tower itself. There is more here than we see, but my mind only holds fragments of my time here.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a36f43ca-50d2-383c-b761-ae622ebcfc20Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf2a1f14cg4ed3g4863gbe6agbc97831ab876Text UUID: 4c32871e-7791-4bc8-9898-fb708e316da6Timeline Phase Index: 123Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a36f43ca-50d2-383c-b761-ae622ebcfc20Timeline Phase Duration: 11.66sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1251.91s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1253.2s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1256.91s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1258.08s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1258.8s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1261.07s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1251.91s-1263.56s] | @ 1263.21s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: a36f43ca-50d2-383c-b761-ae622ebcfc20Group Index: 0
        • +

          Metadata

      104.Player: Where can we find Ketheric?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 405730c4-2b6a-aa30-9704-eaea82ee1f4eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5ff2b2f9g89dbg4a64g9c7cga995be238c09Text UUID: 27cfe158-dec1-487b-8bfc-8b8e07f2f993Show Once: True
      • +
        322.Minthara: His chambers are on the upper level of the tower, but he rarely occupies them.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cb69fddb-8872-33dc-7c61-f4f0b671b271Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0ea27d53g2eaeg41a6g9bd6g584198ac4d7eText UUID: c75d8372-7339-433b-9269-3636d107f366Timeline Phase Index: 176Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cb69fddb-8872-33dc-7c61-f4f0b671b271Timeline Phase Duration: 34.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1749.97s-1761.39s] | @ 1751.11s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1749.97s-1761.39s] | @ 1752.65s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1749.97s-1761.39s] | @ 1757.2s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1749.97s-1761.39s] | @ 1758.69s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1749.97s-1761.39s] | @ 1759.8s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1761.39s-1764.17s] | @ 1761.39s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1761.39s-1764.17s] | @ 1761.71s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1761.39s-1764.17s] | @ 1761.76s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1761.39s-1764.17s] | @ 1762.32s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1764.17s-1784s] | @ 1764.17s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1764.17s-1784s] | @ 1769.26s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [1764.17s-1784s] | @ 1775.32s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [1764.17s-1784s] | @ 1778.6s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 14: Shot 3 [1764.17s-1784s] | @ 1780.64s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: cb69fddb-8872-33dc-7c61-f4f0b671b271Group Index: 0
        • +
          200.Minthara: I think he is beyond the need to sleep and dream, just as he is beyond death. His time is occupied in higher matters.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7e6b5b3b-705a-45de-8483-27c2283a8ecdSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc8b7861eg7181g4a68gbf03g54cbf1b49365Text UUID: a063f30b-271e-47b7-bd9a-8efb39d58d7cGroup ID: cb69fddb-8872-33dc-7c61-f4f0b671b271Group Index: 1
          • +
            285.Minthara: When he is not with his troops, he is usually at the rooftop chapel, where he communes with the Absolute, while surveying his army from above.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2dffade-3fef-f7d4-dcb4-8754cb26cce5Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h23d3dae8g5989g4c97g8e56g05a09491d676Text UUID: 3d81ab49-ea90-4ee2-ad85-92e2f58269d6Group ID: cb69fddb-8872-33dc-7c61-f4f0b671b271Group Index: 2
            • +
              242.Minthara: Access is forbidden to all but his closest advisors. Even if we were among them, it would be suicidal to approach him while his power holds.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 95098f96-2a19-8c60-18f2-0ae52cf20742Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h42db17a3g0299g4608g8ce0g9e7c15830b06Text UUID: 1c4c3b0b-3d09-4612-a136-eed2a2a4de82Group ID: cb69fddb-8872-33dc-7c61-f4f0b671b271Group Index: 3
              • See Node 291 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      271.Player: Is the Absolute really here, in Moonrise?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a99c1fa6-2609-9342-94d4-dddea7eab342Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h662c5ef8g64fdg48e6ga1b7g06a75efeb074Text UUID: 1588ad86-e5fa-4137-8d4c-b753bd42458fShow Once: True
      • +
        57.Minthara: If not here in the tower, then close by. Surely you can feel its presence too?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 26571172-3fde-3211-7b73-dcd3ccdfe9ebSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha275a539g71fag4e34gb59eg1685b22b71b1Text UUID: 345f5ed1-25df-4c71-914d-b18e4a002a6bTimeline Phase Index: 193Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 26571172-3fde-3211-7b73-dcd3ccdfe9ebTimeline Phase Duration: 25.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1925.82s-1932.17s] | @ 1925.82s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1925.82s-1932.17s] | @ 1927.38s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1925.82s-1932.17s] | @ 1929.44s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1932.18s-1942.34s] | @ 1932.18s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1932.18s-1942.34s] | @ 1934.64s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1932.18s-1942.34s] | @ 1935.32s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1932.18s-1942.34s] | @ 1937.3s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1932.18s-1942.34s] | @ 1939.19s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1932.18s-1942.34s] | @ 1940.54s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1942.34s-1951.22s] | @ 1945.07s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1942.34s-1951.22s] | @ 1946.14s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 12: Shot 3 [1942.34s-1951.22s] | @ 1948.96s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 13: Shot 3 [1942.34s-1951.22s] | @ 1950.56s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 26571172-3fde-3211-7b73-dcd3ccdfe9ebGroup Index: 0
        • +
          213.Minthara: When I was held in the prison, I felt an overwhelming hunger, as if I were suspended above a great maw, eager to consume and absorb me.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 842c49dc-2c2e-6892-1d66-ec1c1a5c0c3dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h6fe18abdg9106g4b1bg82f5ge8b591acce91Text UUID: dca48b06-22e5-42d2-9324-f335ab4dd11dGroup ID: 26571172-3fde-3211-7b73-dcd3ccdfe9ebGroup Index: 1
          • +
            359.Minthara: That was the Absolute, and I sensed it is powerful enough to swallow the tower whole if it chooses to.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e2b7dbd5-9602-6a59-0b4c-2bef972711eaSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb8649db9g75dbg4756gac0bgf7a371d6d119Text UUID: 00f8a8be-3871-4c6b-b2e3-dfa401331d99Group ID: 26571172-3fde-3211-7b73-dcd3ccdfe9ebGroup Index: 2
            • See Node 291 Jump to Node 79
  • -

      258.Player: Please don't mutilate any children, Minthara.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a0654772-3214-a979-ebe1-8cf9eb907a46Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h002e8651g67fbg46f5g8c05gcf8bc4801e87Text UUID: c83895f9-f031-41b8-9fa1-4695ada2fc91Show Once: True
      • +
        133.Minthara: Half of the children here are already mutilated by poverty and starvation.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 56d19968-a655-4167-1802-1c494b5e5c5cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7970e9ceg6e00g4640g9447gf69cfeee1f5aText UUID: 145856ab-e862-47f6-8ffe-374113f7371cTimeline Phase Index: 137Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 56d19968-a655-4167-1802-1c494b5e5c5cTimeline Phase Duration: 6.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1382.07s-1388.1s] | @ 1382.07s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1382.07s-1388.1s] | @ 1384.9s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1382.07s-1388.1s] | @ 1386.63s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • +
          405.Minthara: I am reminded of The Braeryn, the Stenchstreets of Menzoberranzan where the sick and the outlawed make their homes.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fe5e6c26-f99a-9bbc-3979-a90650b82870Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h1d43b2d3g0557g4434g9195g1d871dabce08Text UUID: 1048ab86-18c1-44af-8eaa-3d0168721094Timeline Phase Index: 126Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fe5e6c26-f99a-9bbc-3979-a90650b82870Timeline Phase Duration: 17.94sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1291.24s-1300.21s] | @ 1291.24s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1291.24s-1300.21s] | @ 1293.15s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1291.24s-1300.21s] | @ 1297s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1300.21s-1309.18s] | @ 1300.21s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1300.21s-1309.18s] | @ 1302.12s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1300.21s-1309.18s] | @ 1303.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1300.21s-1309.18s] | @ 1305.81s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1300.21s-1309.18s] | @ 1307.14s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: fe5e6c26-f99a-9bbc-3979-a90650b82870Group Index: 0
          • +
            315.Minthara: Despite the destitution, there is profit and opportunity to be found in such places if one is willing to wade through the squalor.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c7b95786-7148-016e-362a-f8c0e09b79ccSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h5461053fgdb83g44e8gb609g9ec73cc2cbf4Text UUID: 9f2721da-20b0-466d-a6dd-9c9c6e652e56Group ID: fe5e6c26-f99a-9bbc-3979-a90650b82870Group Index: 1

      406.Player: You're paranoid. Nobody's trying to pick your pocket.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: ffa9e36e-ef66-cae4-23ba-6747f299fe34Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h0b423b6dgeb20g4326g9bf6gf46b0d586dbaText UUID: 0ab1b082-3b66-4b52-b630-47b8e4f5ce94Show Once: True
      • +
        98.Minthara: Don't be naive. Half of the people here have been greedily eyeing our belongings since we arrived.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3cd021bd-5862-9bd0-c401-9fd3975e6d20Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h94eaa780g8d11g4629g90b1g71dfb954154bText UUID: 88678929-e3a7-4a6d-976d-5092ffdefc72Timeline Phase Index: 185Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3cd021bd-5862-9bd0-c401-9fd3975e6d20Timeline Phase Duration: 6.2sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1861.63s-1867.83s] | @ 1861.63s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1861.63s-1867.83s] | @ 1864.78s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1861.63s-1867.83s] | @ 1866.36s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 405 (Minthara) I am reminded of The Braeryn, the Stenchstreets of Menzoberranzan where the sick and the outlawed make their homes.
    • +
      311.Player: Why not take its head?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c5570fac-567a-b8a5-9154-5b94db64c925Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h8077bf1fg2b12g4488gaa3bg361221cad101Text UUID: f4df3341-96ec-4555-ba7f-1b4af9607b81Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0e621887-e3f7-4956-bbbd-b0ea9a695cb5
      • +
        237.Minthara: If I take its head, how will it learn from its mistakes?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 92793565-dbb2-4861-c487-cbd537a87bfbSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hcb11849eg3e22g436cga734gefddabfe2136Text UUID: 11861cbc-fa3b-490a-9ac5-a92655034187Timeline Phase Index: 209Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 92793565-dbb2-4861-c487-cbd537a87bfbTimeline Phase Duration: 9.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2118.31s-2127.46s] | @ 2118.31s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2118.31s-2127.46s] | @ 2120.82s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2118.31s-2127.46s] | @ 2123.59s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2118.31s-2127.46s] | @ 2125.41s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 92793565-dbb2-4861-c487-cbd537a87bfbGroup Index: 0

          303.Minthara: Even here, a child deserves a second chance.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c2cd7804-e7f1-1e2d-a07c-2a94622cbc3aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4e33184bg9774g4c35ga006g743d5e6eaf3bText UUID: 2187fbc6-d772-44b4-86ac-248d4e25bc7fGroup ID: 92793565-dbb2-4861-c487-cbd537a87bfbGroup Index: 1

    302.Minthara: Murder, oppression, conspiracies. This city has its charms after all.TG_LOW_EnteredLowerCity!TG_LOW_EnteredLowerCityGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      174.Player: It's an impressive place.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 709f1a87-8bd2-aa31-a01a-9c17559be5f9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha28b823egd062g45c6ga07eg9ecd74c7ac8cText UUID: 4a031f99-5f71-4eb1-8cf4-3507db971919Show Once: True

        115.Minthara: My mother visited, during one of her grand tours of the surface world. She claimed the streets were almost as varied and full of danger as those in Duthcloim.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 47473db7-9d3d-8e3c-3caa-3c67a8debf7fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h531d9d07g5d2bg49acgb959g11a019fe8708Text UUID: b3134c57-f08a-45e1-95d9-789cf597734dTimeline Phase Index: 194Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 47473db7-9d3d-8e3c-3caa-3c67a8debf7fTimeline Phase Duration: 14.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1951.22s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1953.65s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1954.48s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1960.02s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1961.55s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1963.04s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1951.22s-1965.46s] | @ 1964.63s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 47473db7-9d3d-8e3c-3caa-3c67a8debf7fGroup Index: 0

      Metadata

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: baa53411-936a-eea8-092a-48a0d2fe07eaSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5cc6d83agef29g4a45gb8d1g189fd7f11d83Text UUID: 3802dc84-4e9f-4c75-8aa9-0505adb4a0efShow Once: True
      • +
        191.Minthara: If you cannot see the appeal of bloodshed and danger, perhaps you should retire from adventuring and farm root vegetables for the rest of your days.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7a8de8c7-3cab-32e6-43ee-ffa021950fb6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h130fe1a7gc958g4e57g9078g0553d59e4a8eText UUID: 22ab2034-ceff-4171-951b-ea95be765894Timeline Phase Index: 181Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7a8de8c7-3cab-32e6-43ee-ffa021950fb6Timeline Phase Duration: 11.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1828.05s-1839.07s] | @ 1828.05s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1828.05s-1839.07s] | @ 1833.42s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1828.05s-1839.07s] | @ 1836.15s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1828.05s-1839.07s] | @ 1837.71s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

    289.Minthara: This place is almost untouched by the squalor of the surface. If I ruled this city, this is where I would make my home.TG_WYR_WyrmwayWYR_Wyrmway_State_InWyrmway!TG_WYR_WyrmwayGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    45.Minthara: While she lives, Orin will continue to terrorise us, and soon she will make good on her threats. She thinks we are weak, afraid, vulnerable.TG_GEN_Orin_MetImpersonation!TG_GEN_Orin_MetImpersonationGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

While Orin lives, she is the greatest threat to our survival - we must hunt her down and eliminate her.WYR_KillDirectorGortash_State_AcceptedAllianceTG_WYR_Gortash_WarnedImpostor!TG_WYR_Gortash_WarnedImpostorGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    15.Minthara: I only survived Orin's sadistic games because she allowed me to. Even if we find her soon, I doubt the child Yenna will be in one piece.TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_Yenna!TG_GEN_OrinAbducted_YennaGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    391.Minthara: Must we talk? The heat is unbearable - my mouth is as dry as a dust devil.TG_LOW_InHouseOfHope!TG_LOW_InHouseOfHopeGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    117.Minthara: I am concerned for Karlach. She is strong, but even her courage may falter now that she knows how little time remains to her.TG_ORI_Karlach_GotSecondUpgrade!TG_ORI_Karlach_GotSecondUpgradeGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      161.Player: She won't give up as long as we support her.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6b722473-708b-2c15-ad8d-65f932061841Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h30221eb4g1f84g4964gb994g0554902f512bText UUID: fd5029fe-79a7-43f9-b7e9-e7436dae18f3Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0e621887-e3f7-4956-bbbd-b0ea9a695cb5
      • +
        346.Minthara: Then that is what we must do.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d7bbb0c4-8bfc-9e58-9707-cbc2e3ed02a4Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf23fdcbfgdfcag4459ga8e9ge71fac7bf567Text UUID: 457d073f-a066-4bf3-8247-73cb1a88656bTimeline Phase Index: 115Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d7bbb0c4-8bfc-9e58-9707-cbc2e3ed02a4Timeline Phase Duration: 1.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1184.07s-1185.84s] | @ 1184.07s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1184.07s-1185.84s] | @ 1184.44s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1184.07s-1185.84s] | @ 1184.75s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1184.07s-1185.84s] | @ 1184.85s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicry
        • +
          62.Minthara: She is a fierce ally, and has survived great torments and challenges already. We would be fortunate to have her with us until the end.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 2af2140e-793c-79e4-5c1d-df7031fa6978Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hfc3811d9g1151g4633gab4cg5170d6d5cd20Text UUID: 788af7f0-ce26-4521-8809-f655497910d6Timeline Phase Index: 197Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 2af2140e-793c-79e4-5c1d-df7031fa6978Timeline Phase Duration: 9.17sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1975.64s-1984.82s] | @ 1976.62s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1975.64s-1984.82s] | @ 1978.43s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1975.64s-1984.82s] | @ 1980.28s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1975.64s-1984.82s] | @ 1981.18s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1975.64s-1984.82s] | @ 1982.18s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1975.64s-1984.82s] | @ 1983.47s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

    • +
      106.Player: It's not like you to be sentimental.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 410bfb28-25a8-92af-ca5c-43695a2b2906Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hedc2ed68g6a77g4769gb71dg64d94f5edb96Text UUID: c685de1d-f81b-48ec-9add-4f57d85dacdaShow Once: True
      • +
        367.Minthara: It is not sentimental to appreciate a warrior's strength, or a companion's courage.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e76c1c6b-a247-5e15-8002-4c96ab3172e1Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf22cc524gdeebg4fd4g91f1gc55f4fb403f5Text UUID: 9c256f8a-f19d-4149-9e31-6e4d5c58458dTimeline Phase Index: 157Timeline Dialog Node UUID: e76c1c6b-a247-5e15-8002-4c96ab3172e1Timeline Phase Duration: 6.49sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1547.23s-1553.73s] | @ 1547.23s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1547.23s-1553.73s] | @ 1548.08s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1547.23s-1553.73s] | @ 1549.64s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 62 (Minthara) She is a fierce ally, and has survived great torments and challenges already. We would be fortunate to have her with us until the end.
    • +
      203.Player: Good riddance. We'll be better off without her.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7f0d4cad-68a0-14c2-0695-52940017a5f2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h119b5502g478cg4af8g842agb53e08f9b4caText UUID: 151c784e-3175-4aa5-a214-bf28e71ff8f7Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: a21b4332-f005-4a5f-8b85-b5ca19c19ee5
      • +
        352.Minthara: You cannot seriously believe that?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dba6070e-1015-1ad9-f111-b1192f30d4afSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0a3a45f8g5d94g4e88gb458gcc3ecf636b26Text UUID: f40f8391-9fe4-4adb-9c36-62ebc7aa6abbTimeline Phase Index: 134Timeline Dialog Node UUID: dba6070e-1015-1ad9-f111-b1192f30d4afTimeline Phase Duration: 2.71sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1363.67s-1366.38s] | @ 1363.67s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1363.67s-1366.38s] | @ 1364.23s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1363.67s-1366.38s] | @ 1365.7s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 62 (Minthara) She is a fierce ally, and has survived great torments and challenges already. We would be fortunate to have her with us until the end.
    • +
      49.Player: There's still hope that we'll find a way to fix her heart.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2216a3de-5ab8-c0ac-7f4d-59d667727567Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h02cdeb55g6a1eg4cf8g84efg6c0516ae922eText UUID: 27a804a0-b83e-47e1-a0eb-9b61feb18b2fShow Once: True
      • +
        279.Minthara: Hope lives in the imagination. I prefer to deal in reality, and in our reality, Karlach is dying.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b1033c2e-19c3-9401-77b0-2e2012c3be0eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h86b2e871g4612g49fbgae34gcd3a30460c66Text UUID: 6d2d2975-44c8-4d19-be6f-b1d2fc6b7f17Timeline Phase Index: 203Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b1033c2e-19c3-9401-77b0-2e2012c3be0eTimeline Phase Duration: 12.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2015.53s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2016.67s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2018.64s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2019.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2020.28s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2021.66s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2024.16s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [2015.53s-2028.37s] | @ 2026.45s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: b1033c2e-19c3-9401-77b0-2e2012c3be0eGroup Index: 0
        • +
          77.Minthara: It is better to accept that, and to make sure she is ready to fight to the last.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 356eb214-c184-d66f-096a-da3db818f303Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h6ca86602g2581g4b18gbfe8g2a318e463b2bText UUID: c36e69b1-841d-4e60-acdc-b0cfe912a66aGroup ID: b1033c2e-19c3-9401-77b0-2e2012c3be0eGroup Index: 1
          • See Node 1 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    347.Minthara: Vengeance can be a bitter pill for a kind soul such as yours, Karlach. I pity you, that you can not savour Gortash's death.TG_ORI_Karlach_AfterGortashDeathAvatarKarlach!TG_ORI_Karlach_AfterGortashDeathAvatarGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      170.Player: It's hard to savour anything when your time is running out.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6f699a94-fcb3-771a-bb7d-c992e3dadbc7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h16dcd1e0g5277g4c0bg8b7bgd3aebebc2db9Text UUID: ed2632f1-7474-4432-bf5b-ecf09de582fbShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0e621887-e3f7-4956-bbbd-b0ea9a695cb5
      • +
        343.Minthara: Indeed. When my time comes, I do not think I will go quietly. Nor should you.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d5383817-ab1c-05e1-24a4-7499fbd82dcfSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb0f69c46g0be3g4d35gb9ddg62f449a60cdbText UUID: 045e7699-5b8e-43dc-87c2-b7bd117fcc90Timeline Phase Index: 116Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d5383817-ab1c-05e1-24a4-7499fbd82dcfTimeline Phase Duration: 9.02sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1185.84s-1194.86s] | @ 1185.84s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1185.84s-1194.86s] | @ 1190.79s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1185.84s-1194.86s] | @ 1193.24s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)
        • +
          333.Minthara: Do as I would. Spend what time remains punishing our enemies.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d11aa64c-55f9-7da9-6d97-63176a0fca04Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h46539af1g8b37g4ab0g8b73g6ac03c5f64b8Text UUID: 7dbcfec5-c1a7-40c2-9b9f-baa005ebc416Timeline Phase Index: 117Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d11aa64c-55f9-7da9-6d97-63176a0fca04Timeline Phase Duration: 6.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1194.86s-1200.95s] | @ 1194.86s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1194.86s-1200.95s] | @ 1199.14s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1194.86s-1200.95s] | @ 1200.26s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
          • +
            283.Minthara: We need your strength to survive what is coming. I vow that you will have mine for as long as you can draw on it.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2b26ad8-83dd-09be-f4c5-b235073b4dd9Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h40b070a0g99bbg40b7ga396g8ca11aab3334Text UUID: 0e35623b-686a-4d10-86c0-1bce65a37be4Timeline Phase Index: 192Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b2b26ad8-83dd-09be-f4c5-b235073b4dd9Timeline Phase Duration: 9.65sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1916.16s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1916.6s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1916.77s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1916.82s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1918.14s | speaker 1 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1918.3s | peanut slot 0 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1918.88s | peanut slot 2 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1916.16s-1920.44s] | @ 1919.14s | peanut slot 1 | Angry (8) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1920.44s-1925.82s] | @ 1920.96s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

    • +
      32.Player: Don't get me wrong - I'm glad the fucker is dead. It's just... hard.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 13d86644-fc93-246b-479b-cf4c402ed2afSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7f69ead1g2e5ag4434g8c69gdc6e6e547009Text UUID: cb504e14-4d89-4eef-8659-ac07164e001bShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: 0e621887-e3f7-4956-bbbd-b0ea9a695cb5
      • +
        294.Minthara: I understand. If I had been told my death is close, as you have, I would rage.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b854b502-0e39-12cb-38ec-2e41e52df920Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h043236dcgcce7g4f33gae17g2bab956a070dText UUID: 88b69a61-fa1b-4bb2-9f3f-ca162f51d4b2Timeline Phase Index: 132Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b854b502-0e39-12cb-38ec-2e41e52df920Timeline Phase Duration: 8.91sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1344.87s-1353.78s] | @ 1344.87s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1344.87s-1353.78s] | @ 1347.48s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1344.87s-1353.78s] | @ 1349.26s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1344.87s-1353.78s] | @ 1350.23s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1344.87s-1353.78s] | @ 1351.66s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)

    158.Minthara: I, for one, will miss the shadow curse. For all the pain it caused us, it did at least obscure the incessant sun.TG_GLO_LiftingTheCurse_LiftedCurse!TG_GLO_LiftingTheCurse_LiftedCurseGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      284.Minthara: Like them, he will be true to his word, should we do as he asks, but he will stand to gain more than he gives.

      109.Minthara: This rite of ascendance suggests he is far more impressive and ambitious than I realised.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 43721a7f-49a3-ace3-97a3-b2f8fb2d3bdbSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha436e14cge89eg42aaga387ga3046d108beeText UUID: 717e7ba1-500c-403a-9a1a-4a89c735dd13Timeline Phase Index: 212Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 43721a7f-49a3-ace3-97a3-b2f8fb2d3bdbTimeline Phase Duration: 6.15sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2152.78s-2158.93s] | @ 2152.78s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2152.78s-2158.93s] | @ 2155.87s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2152.78s-2158.93s] | @ 2157.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
      • +
        371.Minthara: Does your ambition match his, Astarion? You have risen from slavery already - perhaps you can complete your ascension.Astarion

        Flags and Tags

        • Astarion {ffd08582-7396-4cac-bcd4-8f9cd0fd8ef3} = True

          126.Player: I'm not involving myself with any damned infernal rites.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 528ca768-9788-38e8-0607-37fb18653227Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbb125b68g672dg4dd5g9ce7g024708f42bc4Text UUID: c94cc3bc-66a6-4b05-b2c3-718d78930110Show Once: True
          • +
            80.Minthara: Then you should reacquaint yourself with the taste of rat-blood, since you may well be a spawn again before long.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 369cb797-120c-09c0-3c3e-fa6550f61a40Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h50f33fedg61ecg415fg8942g362b2f9568beText UUID: f511d1ee-5bd6-492c-909f-25f4dd4e014dTimeline Phase Index: 175Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 369cb797-120c-09c0-3c3e-fa6550f61a40Timeline Phase Duration: 7.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1742.29s-1749.97s] | @ 1742.29s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1742.29s-1749.97s] | @ 1743.4s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1742.29s-1749.97s] | @ 1744.72s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1742.29s-1749.97s] | @ 1746.22s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1742.29s-1749.97s] | @ 1747.66s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1742.29s-1749.97s] | @ 1748.91s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
            • See Node 215 Jump to Node 79
        • +
          341.Player: I just want Cazador dead. Nothing more.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d4df4058-4039-f4f8-78dc-977b9944f16bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd15b2dd8g1030g46eega358g746a0169147bText UUID: 662556b2-d465-4194-b234-129d079c7078Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: a21b4332-f005-4a5f-8b85-b5ca19c19ee5
          • +
            323.Minthara: Do not be craven. He stole your life. You deserve more than revenge - you deserve to take everything from him.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cc4e2500-4aa5-2651-5a9b-d1cca0dadcd3Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hee82f097g7cdcg4127gb636g7520041e352eText UUID: b33cff2c-6573-4bfb-bd3f-aa1faf8a0982Timeline Phase Index: 133Timeline Dialog Node UUID: cc4e2500-4aa5-2651-5a9b-d1cca0dadcd3Timeline Phase Duration: 9.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1353.78s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1356.12s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1357.43s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1358.36s | speaker 0 | Fear (16) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1360.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1360.81s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1353.78s-1363.67s] | @ 1362.1s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
            • See Node 215 Jump to Node 79
      • +
        42.Minthara: We must destroy him in his lair before he completes the rite, and becomes a threat not just to Astarion, but to our own designs on the city.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1e6ffbcf-755e-6e1b-d8ea-3f71e6c79ee1Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h00908afegba47g42b5gbe2bga4286e13e913Text UUID: 2e1de691-4e54-497f-9355-d697e3959242Timeline Phase Index: 127Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1e6ffbcf-755e-6e1b-d8ea-3f71e6c79ee1Timeline Phase Duration: 8.97sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1309.18s-1312.94s] | @ 1309.18s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1309.18s-1312.94s] | @ 1309.5s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1309.18s-1312.94s] | @ 1309.74s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1309.18s-1312.94s] | @ 1309.99s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1312.94s-1318.15s] | @ 1312.94s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1312.94s-1318.15s] | @ 1314.19s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1312.94s-1318.15s] | @ 1315.73s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

      327.Minthara: That is no excuse for letting my guard down though. We must follow their trail back to Cazador's estate, and save Astarion while there is time.CAMP_VampireAmbush_State_AstarionKidnapped

    221.Minthara: Astarion was a powerful ally. It was foolish to sacrifice him for the favour of the craven Gur.TG_ORI_Astarion_BetrayedAstarionVampireLordToGur!TG_ORI_Astarion_BetrayedAstarionVampireLordToGur

      262.Player: He had become a monster.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: a167ed5a-d40d-fb71-c9be-487c33283e7eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hdbf71966gc123g431cgb498g75b86debff8eText UUID: e8f5e51c-6faf-409f-9b41-48595b461bb9Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: a21b4332-f005-4a5f-8b85-b5ca19c19ee5
      • +
        47.Minthara: A monster may be precisely what we need if we are to survive what is coming.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 211b3b16-10c7-541c-62b3-ba96c67f4c62Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h2fde77b8g34bfg4384g9910g124e4064bdbeText UUID: 9b7037b8-c0e8-4d92-aac1-1c2442511011Timeline Phase Index: 131Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 211b3b16-10c7-541c-62b3-ba96c67f4c62Timeline Phase Duration: 4.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1340.05s-1344.87s] | @ 1340.05s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1340.05s-1344.87s] | @ 1341.15s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • •
          36.Minthara: We will regret his absence. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1594fb63-d4f3-d514-5ad2-7996b35e9161Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha6531a2dg68edg4db8g8e07g405724c3f3f8Text UUID: e73df93e-be81-4f4f-ae62-fa029fd8d6e8Timeline Phase Index: 215Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 1594fb63-d4f3-d514-5ad2-7996b35e9161Timeline Phase Duration: 2.61sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2176.14s-2178.75s] | @ 2176.14s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True

      360.Player: It's not for their favour - it was the right thing to do.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e2edf9e1-29c8-b0c4-1bd6-4fdc5d3e28a5Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: he04421c8g064eg41c2gb36aga983bf3fb177Text UUID: 471df71d-6ec3-4f64-8146-9cbf699c6f6dShow Once: True
      • +
        138.Minthara: I am not opposed to killing an ally who has outlasted their use, but Astarion had become a formidable weapon.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5acde560-abea-0953-15b0-0c8698a06b6cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h06c27b68gb798g4c4cg9572g6ee884178af0Text UUID: 7b5a3146-e23e-458a-b3a6-21dac7e6d050Timeline Phase Index: 146Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5acde560-abea-0953-15b0-0c8698a06b6cTimeline Phase Duration: 7.96sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1441.4s-1449.35s] | @ 1441.4s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1441.4s-1449.35s] | @ 1442.07s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1441.4s-1449.35s] | @ 1445.83s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1441.4s-1449.35s] | @ 1447.81s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1441.4s-1449.35s] | @ 1448.69s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 36 (Minthara) We will regret his absence.
    • +

      228.Minthara: Their entire network in the city has been infiltrated and undone by a handful of imposters.

      16.Minthara: 'Beware loud men with purple scalps and ugly rodents, for they think of you as evil, and will kill you on sight.'

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 09e9b36f-ad6f-0cf9-04b1-33168aa75806Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h94df62a7g68d7g4256ga3a0g027654a75af9Text UUID: 71944954-2cf3-4832-8b48-630b28509825Group ID: c452897d-a1c1-b6bb-6eee-bea13550fcd0Group Index: 1
      • +
        132.Minthara: It is amusing to hear that the Legendary Ranger has become as much a terror in his own city as he is in the Underdark.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 54e3bdd9-cd2f-f32b-b2dc-a558a046d1b9Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hbd5097a4g46c2g4cbeg92b8g04f5f4e88133Text UUID: 483dccf3-c481-4b13-ad88-13916a3a7e58Group ID: c452897d-a1c1-b6bb-6eee-bea13550fcd0Group Index: 2
        • See Node 281 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    88.Minthara: I am loathe to admit it, but if we can pacify Minsc he may be a worthy companion.TG_LOW_MinscEscapedCountingHouse!TG_LOW_MinscEscapedCountingHouseGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      165.Minthara: Any man who can resist being digested by a mimic may even give an elder brain food for thought.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6d853723-9f81-e495-a407-d77528ece12cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h214ef854ge203g4b1dg83e1g149776b5572eText UUID: 5c229f56-a974-41df-99e2-6f736b16f773Group ID: 3844efa4-2642-b29a-f635-e2a5ab500ff1Group Index: 1

  • -
    127.Minthara: It is sad to see how Jaheira has neglected her family. They should be prepared for the battle that is coming, or they may not survive it.TG_ORI_Jaheira_VisitedFamily!TG_ORI_Jaheira_VisitedFamilyGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    Flags and Tags

      51.Player: Distancing them from the conflict is the best way to ensure they live long lives.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 22860b43-900e-28c4-6f98-f31edbe05184Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h9c3e6a38g21a6g4b85gbf8bg2d5a56f754acText UUID: f0c8dfa1-19b7-4e7f-9ee4-aeefe135bf27Show Once: True
      • +
        81.Minthara: If any child of mine spoke of me as disrespectfully as Jaheira's offspring speak of her, their lives would be exceedingly short.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 36c4f9ca-6333-5428-d03a-3b64d54a30ddSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8a5fa3d3gacd0g42d2g9535g320ccd989b3cText UUID: 6bf3bf66-ba87-4833-98e7-349584f46da1Timeline Phase Index: 190Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 36c4f9ca-6333-5428-d03a-3b64d54a30ddTimeline Phase Duration: 9.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1898.25s-1907.8s] | @ 1898.25s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1898.25s-1907.8s] | @ 1900.96s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1898.25s-1907.8s] | @ 1905.2s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1898.25s-1907.8s] | @ 1906.73s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 281 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      152.Player: She's spent her life in conflict - it's natural she wants to protect them from that.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6499e80e-a358-4e00-9c2f-5028d3d1adcbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc969773dgaf98g4659g9d83gaada6037fae2Text UUID: e866f4d9-6b3a-4f24-a7c3-57944e47eadaShow Once: True
      • +
        404.Minthara: Life is conflict. Coddling children, and denying them that truth only makes them weak.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fe528aa4-c375-6c7c-3522-18600258b0ceSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hfc95ff7fg5de0g4f05ga5b3g93ab0b081086Text UUID: 4c4fa834-19a9-4408-860d-d6836fe92e80Timeline Phase Index: 141Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fe528aa4-c375-6c7c-3522-18600258b0ceTimeline Phase Duration: 7.9sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1411.96s-1419.87s] | @ 1413s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1411.96s-1419.87s] | @ 1413.98s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1411.96s-1419.87s] | @ 1415.36s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1411.96s-1419.87s] | @ 1416.84s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1411.96s-1419.87s] | @ 1418.29s | speaker 0 | Sad (32)
        • See Node 281 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      125.Player: You're right. They should be ready to fight.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 505640d1-762d-5692-b5d5-dbb643cd4d51Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc5383e95g9a54g4c58gae68g5b081eca1963Text UUID: 4fe6fe34-753a-49b2-9213-e9e23539d4f4Show Once: True
      • +
        72.Minthara: My mother taught me to talk, to walk, and then to kill. I still hope to thank her by teaching her how to die one day.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 347a6603-3791-2730-ff70-39c4653bff63Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h8a285dc7g67c3g44f1ga8b5ge04d493808c5Text UUID: 02e340a3-7180-4810-8699-fadaab72a4ddTimeline Phase Index: 210Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 347a6603-3791-2730-ff70-39c4653bff63Timeline Phase Duration: 18.98sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2127.46s-2146.44s] | @ 2129.65s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2127.46s-2146.44s] | @ 2132.06s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2127.46s-2146.44s] | @ 2134.5s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2127.46s-2146.44s] | @ 2138.96s | speaker 0 | Sleeping (256) | variation 24Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2127.46s-2146.44s] | @ 2140.92s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2127.46s-2146.44s] | @ 2145.03s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 347a6603-3791-2730-ff70-39c4653bff63Group Index: 0
        • +
          112.Minthara: All things considered, my relationship with her may not be the best model to follow.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 45f48d4f-02e6-25f4-890d-9d171df12f21Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hcd5f3e09gde9bg4e1egad57gf2d8e9207048Text UUID: e62b94ab-b6a7-4c56-80d6-b88f79f5fd7eGroup ID: 347a6603-3791-2730-ff70-39c4653bff63Group Index: 1
          • See Node 281 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    85.Minthara: I will fight alongside Minsc, but if he so much as refers to my butt, let alone attempts to kick it, I will skewer that damned hamster of his.TG_ORI_MinscRecruited!TG_ORI_MinscRecruitedGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    2.Minthara: Slaying as great an enemy of my people as Minsc would normally be a great victory, but he was just another puppet of the cult.TG_ORI_MinscNotSaved!TG_ORI_MinscNotSavedGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      Metadata

      369.Minthara: Once we have conquered the Absolute, perhaps we can turn our attention to dissolving the criminal elements of Baldur's Gate, and replacing them with our own candidates.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eaa2af69-33de-d092-ecff-a3b2a005e523Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h44bfbd80g67a8g4065gb2d0g793beb09fa20Text UUID: 13bc9633-1a65-4e07-9d3d-1c181d184193Group ID: 64916956-3d18-ee73-6ba5-67be6c06f67eGroup Index: 1
      • See Node 206 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    171.Minthara: I must ask you something. First, let me make it clear that I do not object to the killing of Isobel, or the loss of Last Light.TG_DarkUrge_KilledIsobelDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_KilledIsobel

      48.Minthara: But I do not understand why you killed the cleric.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 21b4274d-5058-d18c-8c88-d6db91c616ebSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc29189f7g726eg44cag99a9gb403acf7156dText UUID: 245652bb-252e-40dc-bd76-585050819152Group ID: 6f8f41a1-c4d2-168a-8a77-8070cc77785fGroup Index: 1
      • +
        97.Player: I was ordered to. By my butler.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3cbeb070-0dbe-28c9-73b7-c4dce1c214efSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hd10723d9gb075g4559g935dg02d1aaf93f6aText UUID: 65cad0ff-6e5a-4bde-96b6-f7891df6a8beShow Once: True
        • +
          164.Minthara: Sometimes I think you are quite mad. Other times I think you still hold on to a slim fragment of your sanity.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6d30d657-f3a5-264f-b993-0d58fd647a9fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hf169de68ga7b8g484egbc3cg8a67fe1a5b39Text UUID: 6dd714c1-c3d2-4a5b-bec3-f053aac24cf5Timeline Phase Index: 219Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 6d30d657-f3a5-264f-b993-0d58fd647a9fTimeline Phase Duration: 15.3sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2208.67s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2210.59s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2212.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2217.28s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2220.2s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2221.35s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2208.67s-2223.97s] | @ 2223.26s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 6d30d657-f3a5-264f-b993-0d58fd647a9fGroup Index: 0
          • •
            370.Minthara: I will be watching you - and watching for this 'butler' of yours as well. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: eb74b280-1d1e-d3ba-499f-2c7d3cf49940Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hea67087eg6fe0g4b36g8dd8gbcc612a30d8bText UUID: 21cf85b5-8575-4772-8b16-7061cd5ca28dEnd Node: TrueGroup ID: 6d30d657-f3a5-264f-b993-0d58fd647a9fGroup Index: 1
      • +
        204.Player: For the thrill of it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7f42a4f0-b7a4-a8b2-fa35-46eece4ddd1fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h7d336389g2f4ag46f7gae71gc574ee3f9ad7Text UUID: 13fb591f-2302-44e0-9ae3-6a1e70ab8040Show Once: True
        • •
          385.Minthara: We paid the price for your thrills when the shadows surrounded us. If you must kill for the pleasure of it, select your targets more carefully. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f79748ab-79ab-8275-73ae-558cbcfbbb53Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h69101214g30b5g4da3g9e76g662bfc19d3a7Text UUID: b3071ee9-c9a3-4402-819e-270a4e80cc1eTimeline Phase Index: 213Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f79748ab-79ab-8275-73ae-558cbcfbbb53Timeline Phase Duration: 10.16sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2158.93s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2160.7s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2161.97s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2163.08s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2164.74s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2166.92s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2158.93s-2169.09s] | @ 2168.38s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True
      • +
        387.Player: Isobel and the Harpers would have realised we're a threat to them eventually.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: f82d08a2-1fd6-d459-3e5b-434d562684c2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h832a16e5g0874g47f9g9919g2b80fab687d7Text UUID: a3105c10-e5e4-498f-aeb6-e71fe0f1dc38Show Once: True
        • +
          265.Minthara: I would prefer if you informed me of your intentions before striking in future.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a3217a61-6dc2-70ff-bcf3-57ea87575374Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h4dde7a48g1454g4bc6g8d4dg5c7adf74dbfeText UUID: 74090393-22ee-49c0-ae59-702940454784Timeline Phase Index: 199Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a3217a61-6dc2-70ff-bcf3-57ea87575374Timeline Phase Duration: 5.4sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1987.11s-1992.51s] | @ 1987.11s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1987.11s-1992.51s] | @ 1990.79s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
          • •
            102.Minthara: I prefer strategy to instincts and impulses. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 3f764804-1aac-f402-157e-23fccdece331Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hc4b3ded9g68c0g4e37g84a7g00dd0031d38cText UUID: e4643c50-c62d-4f9a-b987-37f4de213c5eTimeline Phase Index: 222Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 3f764804-1aac-f402-157e-23fccdece331Timeline Phase Duration: 3.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2241.81s-2245.74s] | @ 2242.61s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2241.81s-2245.74s] | @ 2243.94s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2241.81s-2245.74s] | @ 2245.14s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True
      • +

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 1f1c8b45-13b2-2aa4-ba7d-0dbb4912f6ddSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h985b4be5gcd9eg43e6gadecgf2581e29842eText UUID: 77fb5c24-bb1f-4e2a-b27c-85627927343dShow Once: True
        • +

      280.Minthara: I believe you have your urges under control, for now, and that you may become the master of them.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b167ea0c-6eea-c8b2-80c5-210fba615b15Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hab8f0141g8186g4a43gb27cgd2b6ef3ae198Text UUID: 31d51b58-01e3-4092-8a3c-3208e8cb8bf1Group ID: 3c66de98-4a33-549f-5bec-b7a56d06915bGroup Index: 1
      • +
        325.Minthara: But if you so much as think about harming me, I will pluck the thought from your mind, and then your heart from your chest.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: cdc73740-ddbe-bda0-d0d4-540ea270a628Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb250813fgf0f0g4b65g87c4gdb2996b308baText UUID: 475ab3d8-6bff-4d23-a331-257d6b7ece58Group ID: 3c66de98-4a33-549f-5bec-b7a56d06915bGroup Index: 2
        • •
          376.Minthara: That is all. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ef07820a-ab81-be41-7c93-5b9a324bd762Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h2e7ff828gb9acg44c9g9a5fg1acb37d136f8Text UUID: edaa134d-058c-4b01-9352-61ab91657cc2End Node: TrueGroup ID: 3c66de98-4a33-549f-5bec-b7a56d06915bGroup Index: 3
  • -
    226.Minthara: Your past is revealed to us, Chosen of Bhaal. How does it feel, to know who you truly are?TG_DarkUrge_GortashOMDark Urge!TG_DarkUrge_GortashOM

      316.Player: I don't know - I haven't finished processing it yet.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c88afb27-c8cf-0e64-9c90-604fccf286c1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1945f9b7gf226g4561g923fg8e828e1686fcText UUID: 1d452abf-d5bb-42d4-bc80-11c8fb43ae5fShow Once: True
      • +
        181.Minthara: Allow me to process it for you.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 739c627b-0432-eae7-0930-c908cf0ecfedSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb253ec20g09e5g4bbbgb9c4g8a18c608eb58Text UUID: a9a8d081-3b3e-4efe-b3e7-5f6cbf0354c9Timeline Phase Index: 160Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 739c627b-0432-eae7-0930-c908cf0ecfedTimeline Phase Duration: 3.25sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1591.06s-1594.32s] | @ 1591.06s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1591.06s-1594.32s] | @ 1592.02s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)
        • +
          121.Minthara: We believed we were all victims of the cult of the Absolute, but now we learn that one of us was an architect of this grand religious hoax.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 4cb56c6b-a68d-4589-3223-28dd8a5947cfSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0f124987g9209g48c6g8f81ge624ad8a6386Text UUID: 12f332f5-7bd6-40be-aaf8-993716594b33Timeline Phase Index: 156Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 4cb56c6b-a68d-4589-3223-28dd8a5947cfTimeline Phase Duration: 10.92sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1536.32s-1547.23s] | @ 1536.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1536.32s-1547.23s] | @ 1540.13s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1536.32s-1547.23s] | @ 1542.3s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1536.32s-1547.23s] | @ 1544.78s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
          • •
            263.Minthara: You helped to create this conspiracy. That means you may be the best person to help us control it, and the key to our victory. [End]

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a2122658-8bf6-525b-4ae9-c1c136c10c9dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h5517857dgea71g444bg9342g78eb97de2f4bText UUID: 4adf5eaf-7813-4540-8e33-3004fd331aa5Timeline Phase Index: 220Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a2122658-8bf6-525b-4ae9-c1c136c10c9dTimeline Phase Duration: 10.04sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2223.97s-2227.57s] | @ 2223.97s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2223.97s-2227.57s] | @ 2223.97s | speaker 1 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2223.97s-2227.57s] | @ 2224.13s | peanut slot 2 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2223.97s-2227.57s] | @ 2224.52s | peanut slot 1 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2223.97s-2227.57s] | @ 2224.85s | peanut slot 0 | Thinking (4) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [2227.57s-2234.01s] | @ 2231.93s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True
    • +
      232.Player: I want to take back my rightful place.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 90a6d0af-3fe5-0008-cda5-d8c16c8ad03dSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h1df59b6dge018g4b28g9cfcg2adfbb9a8c3eText UUID: 97462526-44fc-45e5-b264-7adf3da46c32Show Once: TrueApproval Rating: 437317c6-19f0-400e-994f-216cca4fa7cb
      • +
        30.Minthara: Good. We will both have our vengeance on Orin. All that we need argue about is which one of us has the pleasure of opening her throat.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 12282b8a-0f59-85ff-af92-9dde4359065fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h74a80a6bgb5cfg4761g86c5gddca33e3ccc6Text UUID: 13416678-9fe4-4396-b75b-05dcaa310e6eTimeline Phase Index: 111Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 12282b8a-0f59-85ff-af92-9dde4359065fTimeline Phase Duration: 17.03sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1108.47s-1125.5s] | @ 1108.47s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1108.47s-1125.5s] | @ 1110.75s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1108.47s-1125.5s] | @ 1112.65s | speaker 0 | Happy (2)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1108.47s-1125.5s] | @ 1114.81s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1108.47s-1125.5s] | @ 1116.05s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 12282b8a-0f59-85ff-af92-9dde4359065fGroup Index: 0
        • +
          247.Minthara: Once she is dead, we can seize control not only the Temple of Bhaal, but the cult of the Absolute as well.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 99005ada-72bf-ef40-3dcb-28591441e2aeSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h169e445eg2813g44ceg95ccg579b094aaedbText UUID: c085e33b-ce87-4f77-a996-9b5e2f7fab74Group ID: 12282b8a-0f59-85ff-af92-9dde4359065fGroup Index: 1
          • See Node 263 (Minthara) You helped to create this conspiracy. That means you may be the best person to help us control it, and the key to our victory.

      358.Minthara: Your father - the Lord of Murder - offered you all of the powers of death and carnage. Powers that we will need before this fight is through.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: e1de9754-f5fe-a64b-9e6f-0d35eb55dc18Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he166095ege747g4aaeg8ef9g93c583b354f1Text UUID: bca3bc78-dc73-4f24-8e33-fa6ab8332110Group ID: 703fef66-7926-ae25-bed7-4eac063fcc2aGroup Index: 1
      • +
        282.Minthara: And instead you have chosen to sever yourself from the legacy of blood that was your inheritance.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b2646235-858f-91f5-3657-56ae81a5904aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he218dd47g43e6g4189g917ag9fe9b1711657Text UUID: 7635991f-0549-4ed4-9f8b-49b33eabe50aGroup ID: 703fef66-7926-ae25-bed7-4eac063fcc2aGroup Index: 2
        • +
          383.Minthara: I was ready to rule by your side, Slayer. But you have given up a most glorious and dishonourable birthright. We are finished.ORI_State_PartneredWithMinthara

          Flags and Tags

          checktype Object | speaker 1 Player
          • ORI_State_PartneredWithMinthara {39ac48fa-b440-47e6-a436-6dc9b10058d8} = True

                172.Minthara: You have seen the fires of the Hells, and the devils who dwell there.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 6fe6f79a-3964-bec6-80fa-09f12971cc82Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h478bd05bg4006g498dg8b3cg4c496f07951fText UUID: b1cc80d1-1f1f-46cf-ba9e-36b768c222d4Group ID: 6ae10b51-d589-c0f3-bdf3-7dba8f6da8d2Group Index: 1

                  245.Minthara: If you believe love is a greater power than all of that, you are stupider than I feared.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 9800e7e1-708f-9a04-097b-36e0c180f6dcSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0355c2begd9f7g446dg91dagf94387c24fa1Text UUID: c4f80c96-1336-4c91-9888-0e355736adecGroup ID: 6ae10b51-d589-c0f3-bdf3-7dba8f6da8d2Group Index: 2
                  • •
                    92.Minthara: If you have any strength left, bring it to the battlefield. You certainly do not have enough to share my bed anymore. [End]note: walks away from the party in disgust

                    Metadata

                    Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 398835eb-6c16-07f7-9387-fcd9230faee6Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h40584bedgd933g4a21gbf10gd78f78497692Text UUID: c51d2969-0b92-4157-9376-15c1c5203994Timeline Phase Index: 217Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 398835eb-6c16-07f7-9387-fcd9230faee6Timeline Phase Duration: 11.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Animation 1 Resource ID: 912eaf3a-997d-4020-aff8-9e81f3f1258bTimeline Animation 1 Resource File: Public/Shared/Assets/Characters/_Anims/Dwarves/_Female/DWR_F_Rig/_Construction/DWR_F_Rig_DFLT_CINE_TurnLeft180_ToWalk_StandL_01.GR2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2187.1s | speaker 0 | Sleeping (256) | variation 24Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2188.62s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2189.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2190.85s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2193.03s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2194.77s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [2187.1s-2198.85s] | @ 2195.97s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2End Node: True

            372.Player: You're only alive because I resisted the Urge to snap your neck the first time we lay together.

            Metadata

            • +

              Metadata

            240.Player: This doesn't mean I'm good now, simply that I'm in control.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 93647ad9-22f2-8a48-d626-10f1c7e91bcdSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hbf6a24f1g96aeg4701g9f00g3898c59d5e05Text UUID: c2794d49-d912-4715-9657-835511e9189aShow Once: True

              153.Minthara: How small-minded. This is not about good or evil - this is about power. You rejected glory, and I reject you.

              Metadata

              182.Minthara: The only reason you ever lost control is because you resisted the truth - rejected the glory of your true self.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 749adbfc-f984-d938-23cd-ff8c1a2c01c1Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd152f6cdg2a8eg4fe1g904cg894e6d8733a3Text UUID: e5d163d5-a954-41ba-9fd7-9c713e2026e0Timeline Phase Index: 158Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 749adbfc-f984-d938-23cd-ff8c1a2c01c1Timeline Phase Duration: 14.56sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1555.06s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1556.73s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1558.21s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1559.16s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1560.21s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1561.55s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1562.45s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 8: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1564.06s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 9: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1565.64s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 1 [1553.73s-1568.29s] | @ 1566.53s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 2Group ID: 749adbfc-f984-d938-23cd-ff8c1a2c01c1Group Index: 0
              • +

                Metadata

        272.Minthara: Fascinating.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: a9d3a439-af18-c184-b62b-e5c082277506Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0cced6f7gf92cg4cd7g8103g04035144bcacText UUID: b1eba482-1053-4fa2-97d7-b16f8d740531Timeline Phase Index: 184Timeline Dialog Node UUID: a9d3a439-af18-c184-b62b-e5c082277506Timeline Phase Duration: 8.67sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1852.96s-1854.94s] | @ 1852.96s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [1854.94s-1861.63s] | @ 1854.94s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1854.94s-1861.63s] | @ 1859.95s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: a9d3a439-af18-c184-b62b-e5c082277506Group Index: 0
        • +
          188.Minthara: Continue to indulge your curiosity in the pursuit of new power, and I might deign to remember it.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 79143fa5-f4d2-f816-69af-b9ed7e772864Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he23b2723g7454g4872g82edg2e6bc47b68c3Text UUID: 73123e3e-cf0a-4a1e-b677-4ae1f2a5bbb6Group ID: a9d3a439-af18-c184-b62b-e5c082277506Group Index: 1

      399.Player: It is my duty to seek out knowledge, whatever the source.

      Metadata

      • +
        402.Minthara: I could not agree more. The pursuit of knowledge and power should always be our goal.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fd6a5045-075e-a784-4ff2-3d871e52a416Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he64f748agaae5g4303ga635g7a9770ebf751Text UUID: 6770b349-5770-4314-b418-2ea43c5b02fbTimeline Phase Index: 113Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fd6a5045-075e-a784-4ff2-3d871e52a416Timeline Phase Duration: 14.64sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1147.22s-1154.72s] | @ 1149.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1147.22s-1154.72s] | @ 1151.07s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1147.22s-1154.72s] | @ 1152.25s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 2 [1154.72s-1161.85s] | @ 1154.72s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1154.72s-1161.85s] | @ 1157.21s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1154.72s-1161.85s] | @ 1158.93s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: fd6a5045-075e-a784-4ff2-3d871e52a416Group Index: 0
        • +

      Metadata

    368.Minthara: I had hoped the wizard may be intrigued by the arcane power of the shadow curse, but it seems he rejects it.TG_ORI_GaleBlessedByMystra!Gale!TG_ORI_GaleBlessedByMystraGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      395.Player: Mystra has chosen to bless me for my efforts against the shadow magic in these parts.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fc138622-2fec-4313-7b86-8935b1acd27bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5cd0f6d2g250bg405cgae9cg845d5824741fText UUID: 4abf0ec7-c3ef-4a00-82ab-c8f825296cb8Show Once: True

        177.Minthara: You would do better to harness the power of that shadow magic than to destroy it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7232bbc9-8171-46d2-d72b-34fd80b81f22Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7b544662g2b20g45b3gabe1gb34ad7ae47f3Text UUID: 3add754c-9f68-494e-bb83-e7c5ec869c0cTimeline Phase Index: 188Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7232bbc9-8171-46d2-d72b-34fd80b81f22Timeline Phase Duration: 11.43sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1881.79s-1893.22s] | @ 1881.79s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1881.79s-1893.22s] | @ 1883.07s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1881.79s-1893.22s] | @ 1885.27s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1881.79s-1893.22s] | @ 1887.64s | speaker 0 | Fear (16)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1881.79s-1893.22s] | @ 1888.49s | speaker 0 | Disgust (128)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1881.79s-1893.22s] | @ 1892.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: 7232bbc9-8171-46d2-d72b-34fd80b81f22Group Index: 0

          Metadata
