      277.Minthara: Destroying the Absolute before we fully understand it would be madness.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: af78756e-8acd-f0f7-5c7c-d4c784266636Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h7bbf9025g0de5g4198gb931g4d1015b8264dText UUID: ca33a2be-bd30-4e9c-8865-03d87a1da5f5Group ID: 6879282c-65d9-ef0b-2714-e5ef5ef81692Group Index: 1
      • +
        392.Player: If it is Mystra's will, I must obey.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: fb5d3cd5-3bcb-376f-fd66-a42d401d04fbSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf10f9d5bg4100g4a18g85e1g8473d61f02beText UUID: 311f03cc-dfe5-4bed-a35b-9fb8e431f1a9Show Once: True
        • •
          216.Minthara: To serve the gods is always a choice, and to martyr oneself for them is insanity. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8568607c-2e21-7b4e-2acb-70e573a9e8b7Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h0670d395g089dg4ab6g98eag0f8e9fcfa57eText UUID: 7552f11e-fba3-495e-9ead-05dfacf0a0fdTimeline Phase Index: 216Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8568607c-2e21-7b4e-2acb-70e573a9e8b7Timeline Phase Duration: 8.35sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2178.75s-2187.1s] | @ 2180.77s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2178.75s-2187.1s] | @ 2182.28s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2178.75s-2187.1s] | @ 2185.13s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True
      • +
        61.Player: We need to destroy the Absolute, no matter what it is.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 2aa3ccc2-f689-c341-e41e-dc735541052cSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hffe73cdcg231cg4636g98a1g6aba0426a657Text UUID: 2dbb85eb-a593-405a-9d2b-0d17a88ccd81Show Once: True
        • •
          137.Minthara: You are a wizard, are you not? Surely you have an obligation to learn about the world and all of its mysteries rather than destroying them. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5a56fb91-50de-8bbf-d527-a7878b0cd09aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h669712a2g9e1dg48fcga243gaed3090f8cd9Text UUID: ca953228-39db-4e4e-a4ad-58b49a4d3728Timeline Phase Index: 218Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5a56fb91-50de-8bbf-d527-a7878b0cd09aTimeline Phase Duration: 9.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2198.85s-2208.67s] | @ 2198.85s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2198.85s-2208.67s] | @ 2203.36s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2198.85s-2208.67s] | @ 2205.24s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [2198.85s-2208.67s] | @ 2206.02s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [2198.85s-2208.67s] | @ 2207.24s | speaker 0 | Pain (2048)End Node: True
      • +
        304.Player: You're right.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c33d57f7-c876-8009-52d8-b0819942d66fSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4d73040dg8941g44eegaed4g0d15cc8b3f75Text UUID: 4d21ed7a-33dd-4d5a-a435-1086ddc0a37aShow Once: True
        • •
          37.Minthara: I'm glad you see reason. To martyr oneself for the fickle gods is insanity. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 16745056-ff57-808f-ad73-15cecffbf639Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h301affdag7a82g4c4bg8a19g91566f2c40f0Text UUID: 89527247-8d9b-46e1-b998-dc3016700ea8Timeline Phase Index: 221Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 16745056-ff57-808f-ad73-15cecffbf639Timeline Phase Duration: 7.8sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2234.01s-2241.81s] | @ 2236.76s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2234.01s-2241.81s] | @ 2238.1s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1End Node: True
      • +
        84.Player: Your concern is for the Absolute rather than me. Touching.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 3775e404-5955-2675-5426-6535556382d7Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hf4885100gad80g4afdg9c68g6938734f3cf1Text UUID: d04cf82f-6853-4709-b158-8ced5b83f565Show Once: True
        • •
          180.Minthara: You are welcome to explode wherever and whenever you please, as long as you do not destroy anything of value. [End]

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 730e50cc-c8b6-2d71-42c5-92f9927d0429Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hda7f4234g0dacg43d6gbb46g2300ca2c1f76Text UUID: b2b4f5db-60fe-4d97-8fc0-54629892436dTimeline Phase Index: 214Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 730e50cc-c8b6-2d71-42c5-92f9927d0429Timeline Phase Duration: 7.05sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [2169.09s-2176.14s] | @ 2169.09s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [2169.09s-2176.14s] | @ 2171.91s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [2169.09s-2176.14s] | @ 2173.6s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)End Node: True
  • -
    183.Minthara: I hope Elminster's message has not left you feeling dejected, wizard. It is better for you to be free of Mystra.TG_ORI_GaleMetElminsterInWYRGale!TG_ORI_GaleMetElminsterInWYRGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

            408.Minthara: Now, return to your books. We have a city to save, and an elder brain to master.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: ffeacb2b-c5ab-c183-7865-6a062fffbe38Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h718ee5b2g8605g41e4ga8a4g8d00fa99e4ecText UUID: 1842800a-83b4-4f6d-af65-572926ba00dfTimeline Phase Index: 140Timeline Dialog Node UUID: ffeacb2b-c5ab-c183-7865-6a062fffbe38Timeline Phase Duration: 6.84sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1405.13s-1411.96s] | @ 1405.13s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1405.13s-1411.96s] | @ 1408.3s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1405.13s-1411.96s] | @ 1410.15s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1405.13s-1411.96s] | @ 1411.35s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

      167.Player: How is it better? Mystra is magic. I'm nothing without her.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6e55e717-5a33-7c49-f14f-18b9d3069e5bSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc1665a97ge38dg4995g8aaeg409def87516dText UUID: 5d99da3c-0a8f-43f5-b935-95eb632da699Show Once: True
      • +
        196.Minthara: Oh? Are you suddenly incapable of touching the weave? Do your spells fizzle before you can cast them? I think not.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7bc716d7-7583-6182-51e8-7db6862b0af8Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd2ba4ef9g1eafg4580ga6ffgc142b34c9312Text UUID: 7758fa8e-8774-4ba2-b045-30f322cc6745Timeline Phase Index: 177Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7bc716d7-7583-6182-51e8-7db6862b0af8Timeline Phase Duration: 10.7sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1784s-1794.7s] | @ 1784s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1784s-1794.7s] | @ 1786.52s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1784s-1794.7s] | @ 1787.58s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1784s-1794.7s] | @ 1789.05s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1784s-1794.7s] | @ 1790.02s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 1 [1784s-1794.7s] | @ 1791.53s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • +
          56.Minthara: You are Gale, Wizard of Waterdeep, and with or without Mystra, you are as great a practitioner of magic as anyone I have ever known.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 25528358-933e-b82d-aa59-c1497d86e609Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha6e43470g096eg4f52gb184g2027390e973cText UUID: 448d13ce-dfbe-4e14-a06c-160f3b10304cTimeline Phase Index: 163Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 25528358-933e-b82d-aa59-c1497d86e609Timeline Phase Duration: 11.57sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1610.28s-1613.65s] | @ 1610.28s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 2 [1613.65s-1621.1s] | @ 1615.41s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1613.65s-1621.1s] | @ 1616.81s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Unmapped Attributes: ApprovalRatingID
          • +
            159.Player: You've never complimented me before.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 6a02811b-e52f-25ba-e630-5f8368fd8c1aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hfcad3a93g6fa8g4c25g8898g61aa41b8684fText UUID: 1830249d-213c-45c3-a1b2-d79ca23158ddShow Once: True
            • +

              • +

            145.Player: You're wrong. I need Mystra.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 5e1ce9e0-4382-36ee-61cc-e486c47beb12Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4f27fb89g618dg4396g8bfdg181f3d2f6371Text UUID: 6adb9d9c-69bc-4bb1-b870-bb78aeab9b40Show Once: True
            • +
              217.Minthara: She has made you believe that you need her. That is what the gods do. In truth, she is not so different to the Absolute.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 85c5ae20-a40d-8999-1755-91d938069e51Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h51a6bab7gcd58g40adgbeddgb37cd8758637Text UUID: cc75f5d3-7f4d-4590-adb0-fdaadce17b68Timeline Phase Index: 125Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 85c5ae20-a40d-8999-1755-91d938069e51Timeline Phase Duration: 25.07sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1266.17s-1275.47s] | @ 1266.17s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1266.17s-1275.47s] | @ 1271.81s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1266.17s-1275.47s] | @ 1273.12s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1266.17s-1275.47s] | @ 1274.13s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 2 [1275.47s-1284.21s] | @ 1276.71s | speaker 1 | Confusion (1024)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 2 [1275.47s-1284.21s] | @ 1277.11s | peanut slot 1 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 7: Shot 2 [1275.47s-1284.21s] | @ 1277.2s | peanut slot 0 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 8: Shot 2 [1275.47s-1284.21s] | @ 1277.23s | peanut slot 2 | Confusion (1024) | mimicryTimeline Emotion 9: Shot 2 [1275.47s-1284.21s] | @ 1282.9s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 10: Shot 3 [1284.21s-1291.24s] | @ 1284.84s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 11: Shot 3 [1284.21s-1291.24s] | @ 1285.97s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 85c5ae20-a40d-8999-1755-91d938069e51Group Index: 0
              • +
                110.Minthara: She infests your notion of the weave, just as the Absolute's voice infested my thoughts.

                Metadata

                Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 43fd109b-184e-00ef-27f1-8d3069781239Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd4dda426gb2efg498eg9031g5664016aa7f4Text UUID: b6fb2471-49c3-4104-98f4-6704df2943c4Group ID: 85c5ae20-a40d-8999-1755-91d938069e51Group Index: 1
                • +
                  41.Minthara: You will realise, soon, how little you need her. Or you will die, mourning a loss that has no meaning.

                  Metadata

                  Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 1dd32388-5307-065d-1781-a9e2c976147eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd6bc0fe7g2f1dg4962ga136g071c78ed5b4eText UUID: 0a498cd8-cf43-495e-a3b6-2f19cc6c8974Group ID: 85c5ae20-a40d-8999-1755-91d938069e51Group Index: 2
                  • See Node 122 Jump to Node 79

    308.Minthara: Devils, Dukes and Blades all must, as common people come to dust. Farewell, young Wyll. TG_COL_Mizora_WyllDied!TG_COL_Mizora_WyllDied

    144.Minthara: I was unsure of our alliance with the Sharrans - betraying Shadowheart seemed a steep price to pay - but I accept the wisdom of it now.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_ShadowheartBetrayed!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_ShadowheartBetrayedGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    Metadata

    Node Type: TagGreetingUUID: 5e0b46c2-30f1-2d58-a6d4-7981af23478aSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h45a3683dgf307g4d0dga950gb8014c4b16fdText UUID: 4857e98d-7549-4a37-8401-33d44f458754Timeline Phase Index: 23Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5e0b46c2-30f1-2d58-a6d4-7981af23478aTimeline Phase Duration: 18.24sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [211.39s-229.09s] | @ 211.39s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [211.39s-229.09s] | @ 214.93s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [211.39s-229.09s] | @ 216.44s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [211.39s-229.09s] | @ 220.32s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [211.39s-229.09s] | @ 221.99s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Root: TrueUnmapped Attributes: GroupID, GroupIndex
    • +
      338.Minthara: Despite my antipathy to Viconia, I am sure she will aid us when the time comes.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3a6bd2a-8c4f-a2b3-cfb4-73e6fd9edf9cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h01cdeab7ga894g4a64g9159gff3d9e2cbe1aText UUID: 1925d110-bdd2-475f-a3cf-d561de59b8e4Group ID: 5e0b46c2-30f1-2d58-a6d4-7981af23478aGroup Index: 1
      • +
        74.Player: What do you have against Viconia?

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 34f14022-14ae-beaf-5429-721081bb1eedSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h613f2b1egc572g4b5eg8ae7gdea9715e19aeText UUID: 49067143-ced0-4a24-85f7-0d990335a3c3Show Once: True
        • +
          335.Minthara: Two hundred years ago, she disgraced her family - the DeVirs - by refusing to obey a divine order from Lolth.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d2d8f5a6-d9b4-b9ca-76eb-8d6a73cc3e3bSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h50a08d8egc5aag4d39gab6fg7a947c1138d9Text UUID: d9badea2-22ad-4cdd-a048-a637dc530079Timeline Phase Index: 159Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d2d8f5a6-d9b4-b9ca-76eb-8d6a73cc3e3bTimeline Phase Duration: 22.77sTimeline Phase Shots: 3Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1568.29s-1582.62s] | @ 1570.11s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1568.29s-1582.62s] | @ 1573.2s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1568.29s-1582.62s] | @ 1576.82s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1568.29s-1582.62s] | @ 1580.89s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 3 [1586.2s-1591.06s] | @ 1586.47s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 6: Shot 3 [1586.2s-1591.06s] | @ 1587.34s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 7: Shot 3 [1586.2s-1591.06s] | @ 1589.56s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Group ID: d2d8f5a6-d9b4-b9ca-76eb-8d6a73cc3e3bGroup Index: 0
          • +
            24.Minthara: It was quite the scandal, and I was young enough that it left an impression on me.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0e3fd567-cba3-38f4-29ad-d223edc432beSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hd63221f2gff3ag402dg8bb3gf31c994d5426Text UUID: 1bda19d6-af62-477a-867d-66d082932d98Group ID: d2d8f5a6-d9b4-b9ca-76eb-8d6a73cc3e3bGroup Index: 1
            • +
              398.Minthara: I admire those who challenge authority, but Viconia fled from her troubles rather than facing them.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fcd4f386-e91c-b1cc-0acf-cc65febce40fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9395ca8fgf27bg41d1gbacdg9b6a7c9fd42eText UUID: 3f019f0f-78eb-40b1-a120-452622c24ad7Group ID: d2d8f5a6-d9b4-b9ca-76eb-8d6a73cc3e3bGroup Index: 2
              • •
                321.Jump to Node 199

                Metadata

                Node Type: JumpUUID: cb0bb9bf-8c03-64da-ecbf-00770d05f71dJump Target: Node 199 (7da9c9e9-de31-8317-7fef-0e2026c4f1f0)Jump Target Point: 1
      • +
        3.Player: You and Viconia don't seem all that different.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 00ea8223-7253-6f10-aa3c-a841791c619aSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h4919419eg37ebg4207g8462gac4aa9ac1316Text UUID: 0299ebca-b9be-49f3-8895-f5177d55541bShow Once: TrueApproval Rating: a21b4332-f005-4a5f-8b85-b5ca19c19ee5
        • +
          384.Minthara: You insult me. Viconia left the Underdark to rule a clergy of mournful waifs, and peddlers of secrets. I have far grander ambitions.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f635bd4a-acde-7ddb-debd-f82c85621246Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9a136348gb895g4c66gb4b6ge12c4d00b6e1Text UUID: 044eb8c0-0d1c-4541-a04e-6ec2352565c0Timeline Phase Index: 149Timeline Dialog Node UUID: f635bd4a-acde-7ddb-debd-f82c85621246Timeline Phase Duration: 12sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1463.27s-1475.27s] | @ 1463.27s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1463.27s-1475.27s] | @ 1468.88s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1463.27s-1475.27s] | @ 1469.73s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1463.27s-1475.27s] | @ 1472.01s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1463.27s-1475.27s] | @ 1472.78s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
          • +
            199.Minthara: I do not mean to diminish her achievements entirely though.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 7da9c9e9-de31-8317-7fef-0e2026c4f1f0Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h26c6e7f0g5030g4ca6gae97g08221c8cb1c5Text UUID: 1e7ae4c9-8ac2-4d75-8994-1506df2741eaTimeline Phase Index: 138Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 7da9c9e9-de31-8317-7fef-0e2026c4f1f0Timeline Phase Duration: 11.75sTimeline Phase Shots: 2Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1388.1s-1392.25s] | @ 1388.1s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1388.1s-1392.25s] | @ 1391.2s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 2 [1392.25s-1399.86s] | @ 1395s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: 7da9c9e9-de31-8317-7fef-0e2026c4f1f0Group Index: 0
            • +
              5.Minthara: She has been exiled from the Underdark for more than a century. She would not have survived if she were not willing to fight.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 04ca8c01-3be4-65b6-29f0-05b2d7ff963eSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hca275a36gabc8g4e10g9536g8c2ac1f373a5Text UUID: 7ad07900-8073-4e48-9b96-ca3c7e7eed4cGroup ID: 7da9c9e9-de31-8317-7fef-0e2026c4f1f0Group Index: 1
              • •
                119.Jump to Node 79

                Metadata

                Node Type: JumpUUID: 48e3af1a-6ade-d227-1fe9-b34592e6f7d5Jump Target: Node 79 (36391b3e-c0ee-82a4-24e6-290838886870)Jump Target Point: 1
      • +
        220.Player: I'm not convinced she will help. She's hardly trustworthy.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 87e90e2b-f4e2-698d-8188-897b289c7ea6Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h00de4a94g3805g4996gbd99gdc760688f36fText UUID: 747bcabe-202d-4887-9782-44457c38f050Show Once: True
        • +
          344.Minthara: If she were here, Shadowheart would remind you that we are hardly trustworthy ourselves.

          Metadata

          Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d677557c-b748-6792-32a2-762618eb819dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hadc4dfdcg4737g43a9g8b6fg819c1914c14aText UUID: a9c80359-686b-462d-b32a-2fb37553cb1dTimeline Phase Index: 152Timeline Dialog Node UUID: d677557c-b748-6792-32a2-762618eb819dTimeline Phase Duration: 19.13sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1495.85s-1514.98s] | @ 1495.85s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1495.85s-1514.98s] | @ 1502.29s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1495.85s-1514.98s] | @ 1503.41s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1495.85s-1514.98s] | @ 1508.35s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)Timeline Emotion 5: Shot 1 [1495.85s-1514.98s] | @ 1509.35s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Group ID: d677557c-b748-6792-32a2-762618eb819dGroup Index: 0
          • +
            26.Minthara: We do not need to trust Viconia, we only need to know which side she will take in this conflict, and that is clear.

            Metadata

            Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0f6d558d-b28b-5695-13b7-6ba148a4b34fSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h9e57784bg2520g4c4aga781ga347b031ab4fText UUID: 3d668d6c-5aeb-4e42-a5fb-f542f19d3b5cGroup ID: d677557c-b748-6792-32a2-762618eb819dGroup Index: 1
            • +
              19.Minthara: She will take our side because it best protects her interests.

              Metadata

              Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0a9e6261-d958-3465-47b7-8a543015d9fcSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h839b007eg79ffg4fb2gbadbg7cb5498cde9eText UUID: 908d4fdb-0886-4370-a75d-5368173290b5Group ID: d677557c-b748-6792-32a2-762618eb819dGroup Index: 2
              • See Node 119 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    70.Minthara: Our victory is at hand. We cannot falter now, no matter what is required of us.TG_END_IllithidOptionsEmperorChoiceMade!TG_END_IllithidOptionsEmperorChoiceMadeGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

  • -
    13.Minthara: That was horrendous. I would rather yank Tiamat's tail than travel beneath the water again.TG_IRN_IronThrone_ReturnedFromIronThrone!TG_IRN_IronThrone_ReturnedFromIronThroneGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    Flags and Tags

    • +
      361.Player: Don't tell me you're afraid of a little water.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: e342793c-5d45-f4ba-6ff5-974e278bcfd2Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h00489fa0g9676g420dgb0e1g038410594374Text UUID: 69126867-ef7a-47d5-923f-82a57b57ff42Show Once: True
      • +
        287.Minthara: I have something of a feline nature. I do not like getting wet, and I will gladly scratch out your eyes if you annoy me.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: b3a5c13a-eb99-e638-4512-0bb7de4c4abaSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he407ca16g473eg43c7gb8bfg12b5844084f1Text UUID: 62de10a0-103a-4f3c-bcc5-18c37d31b39bTimeline Phase Index: 161Timeline Dialog Node UUID: b3a5c13a-eb99-e638-4512-0bb7de4c4abaTimeline Phase Duration: 8.41sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1594.32s-1602.73s] | @ 1594.32s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1594.32s-1602.73s] | @ 1597.6s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1594.32s-1602.73s] | @ 1599.01s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1594.32s-1602.73s] | @ 1600.4s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 108 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      305.Player: Let's stay on dry land from now on.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: c35424c7-edee-98ef-b06f-7da52694d0a1Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hc0e10286gb5feg4762ga7f6gf8d6dcc948d4Text UUID: 65f8dbd9-b68f-448d-8731-dc7e7085b87eShow Once: True
      • +
        142.Minthara: Agreed. Leave the waters to the fish and the aboleths.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 5c1433d7-bc55-b520-209b-a0319664d89dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he4a0b060g5d7cg464dg9f0dgcd7732686e12Text UUID: 0637af48-1094-4afc-a5e3-b17af8578c25Timeline Phase Index: 148Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 5c1433d7-bc55-b520-209b-a0319664d89dTimeline Phase Duration: 5.01sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1458.25s-1463.27s] | @ 1458.25s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 108 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      154.Player: That was exciting. Where's your sense of adventure?

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 66dd8ed7-2094-ce38-2554-cad545073b03Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: hba1f5b63g52a3g47faga6d3gced6e042267fText UUID: 1f72e22e-27fb-4e3a-8585-1952ce46ec5eShow Once: True
      • +
        394.Minthara: My sense of self-preservation outmuscled it on this occasion.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: fb8816d8-a113-990b-0e6c-142850dc5bf1Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hda64d1eeg1765g4a1cg8ab0g41c8509d78c0Text UUID: 60f36220-09a5-4195-93fd-981f8389f249Timeline Phase Index: 145Timeline Dialog Node UUID: fb8816d8-a113-990b-0e6c-142850dc5bf1Timeline Phase Duration: 4.89sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1436.51s-1441.4s] | @ 1436.51s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1436.51s-1441.4s] | @ 1439.99s | speaker 0 | Surprise (64)
        • See Node 108 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    23.Minthara: We have done Umberlee's will. Now let us stay far from the depths of her dread domain.TG_LOW_BellyOfTheBeast_KilledBeastmasterAfterReceivingQuest!TG_LOW_BellyOfTheBeast_KilledBeastmasterAfterReceivingQuestGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    TG_LOW_BellyOfTheBeast_ReceivedRewardForHandingOverBeastmasterAlive!TG_LOW_BellyOfTheBeast_ReceivedRewardForHandingOverBeastmasterAliveGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    256.Minthara: We have attracted Umberlee's wrath. Let us be sure not to take any long sea voyages in the near future.TG_LOW_BellyOfTheBeast_SavedBeastmasterFromWaveservants!TG_LOW_BellyOfTheBeast_SavedBeastmasterFromWaveservantsGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    184.Minthara: Vengeance is a bitter pill for kind souls. I pity Karlach that she could not savour Gortash's death.TG_ORI_Karlach_AfterGortashDeathCompanion!TG_ORI_Karlach_AfterGortashDeathCompanionGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      201.Player: It must be hard to savour anything when your time is running out.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: 7ecee44c-8348-3f12-bc29-bd6fd8efd91eSpeaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h34f9360fg0791g495dgacf4g6ea7cd5840e2Text UUID: 179d6bba-a464-4cf1-90b8-f90983981a84Show Once: True
      • +
        320.Minthara: Indeed. When my time comes, I will not go quietly.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: c9ee0fe7-af73-0e07-140f-0aaf0df1de3cSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h355d0167g69b7g4de3ga630gc60a956ae0cbText UUID: 2d273eb4-5215-4cd5-baa1-1b53bf904745Timeline Phase Index: 122Timeline Dialog Node UUID: c9ee0fe7-af73-0e07-140f-0aaf0df1de3cTimeline Phase Duration: 5.82sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1246.08s-1251.91s] | @ 1246.08s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1246.08s-1251.91s] | @ 1250.49s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1246.08s-1251.91s] | @ 1251.15s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

    • +
      355.Player: It was a great victory - we should all celebrate.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: de449327-fd4e-51a0-4767-2117fbd8e4e9Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: ha63a5e74g6d25g43ebg8b4cgc11f52d83b96Text UUID: 0092f14c-ccd7-45e6-b29c-d88d9601a2a7Show Once: True
      • +
        225.Minthara: For her sake, we should not. And besides, celebrations can come later - our fight is not over yet.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 8db954bf-d8e4-e0a3-8b7d-ad248556ce8dSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h64c4d372g8b8bg412cg9077g89aed2426713Text UUID: 643e9cd8-2611-4bb6-820f-cc2b16c09245Timeline Phase Index: 165Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 8db954bf-d8e4-e0a3-8b7d-ad248556ce8dTimeline Phase Duration: 7.08sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1634.76s-1641.84s] | @ 1635.6s | speaker 0 | Thinking (4)Timeline Emotion 2: Shot 1 [1634.76s-1641.84s] | @ 1637.87s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)Timeline Emotion 3: Shot 1 [1634.76s-1641.84s] | @ 1639.91s | speaker 0 | Angry (8) | variation 1Timeline Emotion 4: Shot 1 [1634.76s-1641.84s] | @ 1640.82s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)
        • See Node 71 Jump to Node 79
    • +
      337.Player: She needs to pull herself together. We haven't won this fight yet.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagQuestionUUID: d3a08bec-749c-4c5e-8cca-42dd855b0077Speaker: 1 (Player)Text Handle: h5b850343g4e96g476fgb840g48826c594831Text UUID: 1edc218d-2776-481f-9773-ec5a667df5a5Show Once: True
      • +
        20.Minthara: She will be ready to right when we need her, I am sure of it.

        Metadata

        Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0bfca208-40c0-b5ae-563d-b7d6eb3c7c04Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hb70d6e34gd487g4420ga1e9g7b6d6f0667e7Text UUID: 285f01c4-ca5c-4ec3-9299-95e8342646e5Timeline Phase Index: 154Timeline Dialog Node UUID: 0bfca208-40c0-b5ae-563d-b7d6eb3c7c04Timeline Phase Duration: 4.68sTimeline Phase Shots: 1Timeline Emotion 1: Shot 1 [1521.58s-1526.26s] | @ 1524.88s | speaker 0 | Angry (8)

  • •
    229.Minthara: Do what must be done. Become illithid, and we can end this.TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFate!TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFate

    8.Minthara: Karlach is willing to become illithid so that we need not make that sacrifice. We should not stand in her way.TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateKarlach!TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateKarlach

  • -
    269.Minthara: Orpheus believes it is his destiny to prevent the Grand Design. If he is willing to become illithid to do so, who are we to stand in his way?TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateOrpheus!TG_END_IllithidOptionsOrpheusFateOrpheusGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    345.Minthara: Wyll would be wiser to leverage his family name for a position of power in Baldur's Gate than to roam the wilds like some errant ranger.TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfFrontiers!TG_ORI_Wyll_IsBladeOfFrontiersGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    134.Minthara: Patricide is often the first step toward greatness, but I hope Wyll does not regret sacrificing his infernal powers.TG_ORI_WyllReleasedFromPact!TG_ORI_WyllReleasedFromPactGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    234.Minthara: Lae'zel was wise to slay the githyanki rebel. We have already angered enough gods, we need not anger Vlaakith as well.TG_ORI_Laezel_VossCampConfrontationVlaakithOutcome!TG_ORI_Laezel_VossCampConfrontationVlaakithOutcomeGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    340.Minthara: If our travelling companions continue to make poor choices, we will soon have every god in this plane and the next hunting us.TG_ORI_Laezel_VlaakithVisitRejectedMission!TG_ORI_Laezel_VlaakithVisitRejectedMissionGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    99.Minthara: The gith god-queen is dreadful to behold. I understand now why you admire her.TG_ORI_Laezel_VlaakithVisitAcceptedMissionLae'zel!TG_ORI_Laezel_VlaakithVisitAcceptedMissionGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    186.Minthara: If the devil truly holds an artefact that can free Prince Orpheus, we cannot ignore it. Any ally who can aid us against the brain is worth having.TG_LOW_LearnedOrphicHammer!TG_LOW_LearnedOrphicHammerGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    94.Minthara: The Orphic Hammer may be the key to our survival. I for one would be glad to avoid complete ceremorphosis.TG_LOW_GotOrphicHammer!TG_LOW_GotOrphicHammerGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    257.Minthara: You feint as well as any matron mother in Menzoberranzan. Let the wizard lie back, and nurse his wounded ambitions.TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_PlayersConvincedNSIsDead!TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_PlayersConvincedNSIsDead

      353.Minthara: When Dame Aylin comes for him, I only hope she stays her blade a moment - to let him see his folly in his final breath.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: dd327f81-7230-34cc-ef5e-97b3653c77feSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: he48366ffg3a12g4dd5gb941ga2cec89abf0cText UUID: a78dff59-e4a5-4587-900f-12b35a623e39Group ID: a034aa87-2c49-27a4-45e5-b1e82ac2bb0bGroup Index: 1

    261.Minthara: Lorroakan's the type to cower behind contraptions and cantrips rather than facing danger. He has about as much spine as a grey ooze.TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_LorroakanStatesHisPlan!TG_LOW_SorcerousSundries_LorroakanStatesHisPlanGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

      241.Minthara: Dame Aylin is likely to tear him in half if she learns of his plans. We should tell her immediately.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 938327b2-179f-12d4-39f7-3da0401063ddSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: hcf1643bcg0f9eg4f93g9c6fgab0b4b606945Text UUID: 27c1d7d2-fbbd-4f12-bf83-6f8a943b8eb2Group ID: a14fe499-9812-3d0c-9c3f-d7957ec06857Group Index: 1
      • See Node 236 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    378.Minthara: I would live forever if I could. Death is not rest or relief, it is only ever a form of defeat.TG_ORI_Jaheira_BurnedScroll!TG_ORI_Jaheira_BurnedScrollGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    351.Minthara: Shadowheart was a fine cleric, but if her obsession with Shar is more important than the task at hand, we are better off without her.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_TempleLeftParty!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_TempleLeftPartyGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    • +
      339.Minthara: I see her grimace when Shar wracks her soul though, and I see the doubt in her eyes as the pain causes her to doubt the path she has taken.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: d3a9e08e-2ce1-8d98-4baf-2c2570474ddaSpeaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h698bd71fge2f9g4324g8052g31c83cc53277Text UUID: 3f1920a8-dfeb-4016-99d8-bb2c21612c8eGroup ID: ed845afd-d5a8-bfae-2507-accc8a73808cGroup Index: 1
      • See Node 236 Jump to Node 79
  • -
    307.Minthara: Killing one's parents can be an important rite of passage - a usurpation of their place in society.TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_KilledParents!TG_ORI_Shadowheart_RejectShar_KilledParentsGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting

    • +
      21.Minthara: Shadowheart may not have gained status from her parents' death, but she has freed herself from Shar's influence. There is comfort in that.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: 0c571be1-36a6-39ac-7221-095a32028093Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: h33963209g0fe0g4419g8e38g44c142b08bfaText UUID: f01529a9-f160-40f9-ae85-cfe0c75bca12Group ID: c45f64e4-2944-a574-3a5f-ff649659afc8Group Index: 1

      389.Minthara: Though she does not remember what she has done, the child Shadowheart became a proud woman today. And a strong leader.

      Metadata

      Node Type: TagAnswerUUID: f8956c2a-e258-4246-be23-2176a82b86c5Speaker: 0 (Minthara)Text Handle: ha040ba93g0347g49ffg92e7g60ba9e91a459Text UUID: ce24f859-3e4c-4c2d-ab4d-e0990efb4394Group ID: 0604023f-3432-d5ad-026b-7a430dd88698Group Index: 1

  • -
    349.Minthara: You embrace your illithid self. Good - to deny it is as foolish as denying any other possible advantage, whatever the source.TG_GLO_FirstUseTadpole!TG_GLO_FirstUseTadpoleGLO_Minthara_InParty_HadTopicalGreeting
